---
title: "SVG Viewer"
description: "Free online SVG viewer. Paste SVG code or drop an .svg file to preview, inspect, and export it — everything runs in your browser, nothing is uploaded."
toc: false
show-reading-time: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'PT Sans', sans-serif; }
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; }

.svg-viewer-container {
  max-width: 900px;
}

.svg-viewer-container label {
  display: block;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-top: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  color: #555;
}

#svg-input {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 200px;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  resize: vertical;
  transition: border-color 0.2s;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

#svg-input:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: #2c7be5;
}

#svg-preview {
  margin-top: 20px;
  min-height: 200px;
  padding: 20px;
  border: 2px dashed #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #fcfcfc;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
  overflow: auto;
}

#svg-preview.has-content {
  border-color: #2c7be5;
  border-style: solid;
  background: white;
}

#svg-preview svg {
  max-width: 100%;
  height: auto;
}

#svg-empty {
  color: #aaa;
  font-size: 15px;
}

.svg-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 12px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.svg-actions button {
  padding: 8px 16px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fafafa;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}

.svg-actions button:hover {
  border-color: #2c7be5;
  background: #eef5ff;
}

.svg-error {
  margin-top: 10px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff5f5;
  border: 1px solid #ffcccc;
  color: #cc0000;
  font-size: 13px;
  display: none;
}

.svg-error.visible {
  display: block;
}

.file-drop {
  position: relative;
}

.file-drop-overlay {
  display: none;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  background: rgba(44, 123, 229, 0.08);
  border: 2px dashed #2c7be5;
  border-radius: 8px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #2c7be5;
  font-weight: 600;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.file-drop.dragging .file-drop-overlay {
  display: flex;
}
</style>

<p>Paste SVG code or drop an <code>.svg</code> file to preview it. Everything runs in your browser, nothing is uploaded.</p>

<div class="svg-viewer-container">

<label for="svg-input">SVG Code</label>
<div class="file-drop" id="file-drop">
  <textarea id="svg-input" placeholder="Paste your SVG code here, or drag & drop an .svg file..."></textarea>
  <div class="file-drop-overlay">Drop SVG file here</div>
</div>

<div class="svg-error" id="svg-error"></div>

<div class="svg-actions">
  <button id="btn-clear">Clear</button>
  <button id="btn-download-svg">Download SVG</button>
  <button id="btn-download-png">Download PNG</button>
  <button id="btn-copy">Copy SVG</button>
</div>

<label>Preview</label>
<div id="svg-preview">
  <span id="svg-empty">Paste SVG code above to see the preview</span>
</div>

</div>

<script>
(function() {
  const input = document.getElementById('svg-input');
  const preview = document.getElementById('svg-preview');
  const emptyMsg = document.getElementById('svg-empty');
  const errorEl = document.getElementById('svg-error');
  const fileDrop = document.getElementById('file-drop');

  function renderSVG() {
    const code = input.value.trim();
    errorEl.classList.remove('visible');
    errorEl.textContent = '';

    if (!code) {
      preview.innerHTML = '<span id="svg-empty">Paste SVG code above to see the preview</span>';
      preview.classList.remove('has-content');
      return;
    }

    // Basic validation: must contain <svg
    if (!code.includes('<svg')) {
      errorEl.textContent = 'Not valid SVG: missing <svg> element.';
      errorEl.classList.add('visible');
      preview.innerHTML = '<span id="svg-empty">Invalid SVG code</span>';
      preview.classList.remove('has-content');
      return;
    }

    // Sanitize: remove any script tags
    const sanitized = code.replace(/<script[\s\S]*?<\/script>/gi, '');

    preview.innerHTML = sanitized;
    preview.classList.add('has-content');

    // Check if SVG actually rendered
    const svgEl = preview.querySelector('svg');
    if (!svgEl) {
      errorEl.textContent = 'Could not render SVG. Check your code for errors.';
      errorEl.classList.add('visible');
      preview.classList.remove('has-content');
    }
  }

  input.addEventListener('input', renderSVG);

  // Clear button
  document.getElementById('btn-clear').addEventListener('click', function() {
    input.value = '';
    renderSVG();
  });

  // Copy button
  document.getElementById('btn-copy').addEventListener('click', function() {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(input.value).then(function() {
      var btn = document.getElementById('btn-copy');
      btn.textContent = 'Copied!';
      setTimeout(function() { btn.textContent = 'Copy SVG'; }, 1500);
    });
  });

  // Download SVG
  document.getElementById('btn-download-svg').addEventListener('click', function() {
    const code = input.value.trim();
    if (!code) return;
    const blob = new Blob([code], { type: 'image/svg+xml' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = 'image.svg';
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  });

  // Download PNG
  document.getElementById('btn-download-png').addEventListener('click', function() {
    const svgEl = preview.querySelector('svg');
    if (!svgEl) return;

    const svgData = new XMLSerializer().serializeToString(svgEl);
    const svgBlob = new Blob([svgData], { type: 'image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(svgBlob);

    const img = new Image();
    img.onload = function() {
      const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
      const scale = 2; // 2x for retina
      canvas.width = img.naturalWidth * scale;
      canvas.height = img.naturalHeight * scale;
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      ctx.scale(scale, scale);
      ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);

      const a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
      a.download = 'image.png';
      a.click();
    };
    img.src = url;
  });

  // Drag and drop
  fileDrop.addEventListener('dragover', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    fileDrop.classList.add('dragging');
  });

  fileDrop.addEventListener('dragleave', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    fileDrop.classList.remove('dragging');
  });

  fileDrop.addEventListener('drop', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    fileDrop.classList.remove('dragging');
    const file = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
    if (file && (file.type === 'image/svg+xml' || file.name.endsWith('.svg'))) {
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onload = function(ev) {
        input.value = ev.target.result;
        renderSVG();
      };
      reader.readAsText(file);
    } else {
      errorEl.textContent = 'Please drop an .svg file.';
      errorEl.classList.add('visible');
    }
  });
})();
</script>
```
